trans-unit.source: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly.
trans-unit.target: With our premium add-on, your integrated chatbot stays up to date. Updated website content is automatically incorporated into the chatbot's knowledge base. 14-day free trial, then billed monthly.

trans-unit.source: No configuration has automatic sync enabled yet.
trans-unit.target: No configuration has automatic sync enabled yet.

trans-unit.source: Enable it in AI Tools → OpenAI Configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: Enable it in AI Tools → OpenAI Configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source: Could not reach license server - sync allowed under grace period.
trans-unit.target: Could not reach license server - sync allowed under grace period.

trans-unit.source: Enter a valid license key in the OpenAI Configuration to unlock details and automatic sync.
trans-unit.target: Enter a valid license key in the OpenAI Configuration to unlock details and automatic sync.

trans-unit.source: External trigger that wakes Contao every minute.
trans-unit.target: External trigger that wakes Contao every minute.

trans-unit.source: Your server cron may have stopped.
trans-unit.target: Your server cron may have stopped.

trans-unit.source: The server cron has not run yet. Scheduled syncs only start once the cron job is set up. Add the following entry to your server cron:
trans-unit.target: The server cron has not run yet. Scheduled syncs only start once the cron job is set up. Add the following entry to your server cron:

trans-unit.source: A manual sync via "Run sync now" works independently of this, as soon as the remaining prerequisites are met.
trans-unit.target: A manual sync via "Run sync now" works independently of this, as soon as the remaining prerequisites are met.

trans-unit.source: Result of the last vector store update.
trans-unit.target: Result of the last vector store update.

trans-unit.source: This configuration syncs only when you click “Run sync now”. No server cron is required.
trans-unit.target: This configuration syncs only when you click “Run sync now”. No server cron is required.

trans-unit.source: No automatic schedule — start each sync with the button below.
trans-unit.target: No automatic schedule — start each sync with the button below.

trans-unit.source: Manual sync button unavailable on this server
trans-unit.target: Manual sync button unavailable on this server

trans-unit.source: This server disables PHP process spawning (proc_open), so the “Run sync now” button cannot start the sync. Run it from the command line instead (e.g. via SSH or a one-off cron task):
trans-unit.target: This server disables PHP process spawning (proc_open), so the “Run sync now” button cannot start the sync. Run it from the command line instead (e.g. via SSH or a one-off cron task):

trans-unit.source: Defined by you in the OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: Defined by you in the OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: Your license still works for now, but a payment needs attention.
trans-unit.target: Your license still works for now, but a payment needs attention.

trans-unit.source: Check for plan changes without re-entering your key
trans-unit.target: Check for plan changes without re-entering your key

trans-unit.source: License is not active. Enter a valid key in the OpenAI Configuration.
trans-unit.target: License is not active. Enter a valid key in the OpenAI Configuration.

trans-unit.source: Your last synced content is still accessible in OpenAI but will no longer be updated automatically.
trans-unit.target: Your last synced content is still accessible in OpenAI but will no longer be updated automatically.

trans-unit.source: If you recently re-subscribed, a new license key was sent to your email. Enter it in the OpenAI Configuration to reactivate sync.
trans-unit.target: If you recently re-subscribed, a new license key was sent to your email. Enter it in the OpenAI Configuration to reactivate sync.

trans-unit.source: Cannot dispatch sync: proc_open is disabled on this server. Run the sync via the command line instead: php vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync [config-id]
trans-unit.target: Cannot dispatch sync: proc_open is disabled on this server. Run the sync via the command line instead: php vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync [config-id]

trans-unit.source: The automatically synced files are written directly into the vector store and do not appear under File upload. The File upload screen is only for files you upload manually.
trans-unit.target: The automatically synced files are written directly into the vector store and do not appear under File upload. The File upload screen is only for files you upload manually.

trans-unit.source: These are token counts. The OpenAI API does not report costs; see your actual billed usage in the OpenAI dashboard.
trans-unit.target: These are token counts. The OpenAI API does not report costs; see your actual billed usage in the OpenAI dashboard.

trans-unit.source: No stored document is available for this sync run.
trans-unit.target: No stored document is available for this sync run.

trans-unit.source: Stop the automatic synchronisation for this configuration? No further scheduled syncs will run until you re-enable it in the OpenAI configuration.
trans-unit.target: Stop the automatic synchronisation for this configuration? No further scheduled syncs will run until you re-enable it in the OpenAI configuration.

trans-unit.source: Automatic synchronisation stopped. Re-enable it any time in the OpenAI configuration under "Vector store sync".
trans-unit.target: Automatic synchronisation stopped. Re-enable it any time in the OpenAI configuration under "Vector store sync".

trans-unit.source: "Stop automatic sync" unticks "Enable sync" in the OpenAI configuration. Re-enable it there whenever you want scheduled syncs to resume.
trans-unit.target: "Stop automatic sync" unticks "Enable sync" in the OpenAI configuration. Re-enable it there whenever you want scheduled syncs to resume.

trans-unit.source: Sync queued. Refresh this page in a few minutes to see the result.
trans-unit.target: Sync queued. Refresh this page in a few minutes to see the result.

trans-unit.source: Manual sync dispatched to CLI. Refresh this page in a few minutes.
trans-unit.target: Manual sync dispatched to CLI. Refresh this page in a few minutes.

trans-unit.source: No indexed pages found for this site root (tl_search is empty). Run System → Maintenance → Rebuild search index. If pages are still missing, check whether they carry robots=noindex or Search indexer=Never index — set Search indexer=Always index on those page records to force-include them in both Contao search and the vector store.
trans-unit.target: No indexed pages found for this site root (tl_search is empty). Run System → Maintenance → Rebuild search index. If pages are still missing, check whether they carry robots=noindex or Search indexer=Never index — set Search indexer=Always index on those page records to force-include them in both Contao search and the vector store.

trans-unit.source: No page content found to upload; aborting before replacing the existing file.
trans-unit.target: No page content found to upload; aborting before replacing the existing file.

trans-unit.source: The model returned an empty document; aborting before replacing the existing file.
trans-unit.target: The model returned an empty document; aborting before replacing the existing file.

trans-unit.source: No vector store ID configured. Complete the file upload workflow or set a vector store ID first.
trans-unit.target: No vector store ID configured. Complete the file upload workflow or set a vector store ID first.

trans-unit.source: Multiple site roots detected. Select the pages to keep updated in OpenAI Configuration → Vector store sync.
trans-unit.target: Multiple site roots detected. Select the pages to keep updated in OpenAI Configuration → Vector store sync.

trans-unit.source: Could not create a temporary file for the upload.
trans-unit.target: Could not create a temporary file for the upload.

trans-unit.source: OpenAI Files upload did not return a file ID.
trans-unit.target: OpenAI Files upload did not return a file ID.

trans-unit.source: Automatic sync is not enabled for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: Automatic sync is not enabled for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: A sync is already queued or running for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: A sync is already queued or running for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: Could not start the sync process. Your host may disable PHP process spawning (proc_open). Run it from the command line instead: vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync <id>
trans-unit.target: Could not start the sync process. Your host may disable PHP process spawning (proc_open). Run it from the command line instead: vendor/bin/contao-console contao:openai-vector-sync <id>

trans-unit.source: No usable OpenAI API key for configuration %id%.
trans-unit.target: No usable OpenAI API key for configuration %id%.

trans-unit.source: No vector store exists yet. Upload one document once via AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → File upload; this automatically creates the vector store.
trans-unit.target: No vector store exists yet. Upload one document once via AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard → File upload; this automatically creates the vector store.

trans-unit.source: No pages selected. Choose the pages to keep updated in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard) under "Vector store sync".
trans-unit.target: No pages selected. Choose the pages to keep updated in the OpenAI configuration (AI Tools → OpenAI Dashboard) under "Vector store sync".

trans-unit.source:
No pages in the search index yet. Update the search index under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index" before the first sync.
Also check the relevant page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7).
trans-unit.target:
No pages in the search index yet. Update the search index under System → Maintenance → "Update the search index" before the first sync.
Also check the relevant page settings "Robots tag" and "Do not search the page" (Contao 5.3) or "Search indexer" (Contao 5.7).

trans-unit.source: No active premium license for this configuration.
trans-unit.target: No active premium license for this configuration.

trans-unit.source: To do before the first sync:
trans-unit.target: To do before the first sync:

trans-unit.source: Everything is ready - the sync can run.
trans-unit.target: Everything is ready - the sync can run.

trans-unit.source: Everything is ready - automatic synchronisation is active and runs on schedule. You can also start a manual sync any time below.
trans-unit.target: Everything is ready - automatic synchronisation is active and runs on schedule. You can also start a manual sync any time below.

trans-unit.source: Resolve the open items above first.
trans-unit.target: Resolve the open items above first.
